examples: I am a stripper at heart really. I like taking things off.
He was glaring at the stripper, his eyes dark above the mask that gave his face a ghoulish appearance.
I don't actually mind, we have a nice evening - paint-stripper wine, a Thai meal and a seedy bar - and his friends are fun.
Stripper wells are marginal, low-volume wells that produce less than 10 barrels of oil per day.
Stripper Ginger Lee tells reporters in New York that Weiner asked her to lie about their communications.
